title: The Content SMP Combat Pack (Based Off Arsenal)
description: A high detail pack that aims to bring custom weapons from Content SMP to vanilla minecraft using named variants, and itemstates.
body:
# Content SMP Combat Pack
Content SMP has a lot of weapons, and most of us know that now that. but the problem with these weapons is that most of them are/were paywalled, and I'm not the one to say that that's a bad idea> (It's not) But looking at the resolution of the weapons: I thought they could be bigger.
And why stop at bigger? how about taking it out of the mod namespace, and make use of minecrafts new itemstates feature, for all minecraft versions above 1.21.5?

## Yes, I did it
Now when you name your handy tools certain titles, (see the bottom of the description for specifications) you will see them as shown on CSMP, with my own little twist to them.

The pack even contains working in-GUI textures to match the vanilla trident, and on top of that: hoes have been turned into scythes. for use in combat, use [enchancement.](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement)

# Names:
Netherite hoe (now netherite scythe):

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Clown's Scythe, Folly's Tree Branch, Dread Scythe, Spine Splitter, Gilded Hook, Netherite Hook,

  
</details>

Netherite pickaxe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Cold Anchor, L'Ancre, Deep Grapple, Rib Pick, Gilded Grapple, Dread Anchor,


</details>

Swords:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Wooden Longsword, Stone Longsword, Iron Longsword, Golden Longsword, Diamond Longsword, Dusk Cleaver, Wooden Hook, Stone Hook, Iron Hook, Golden Hook, Diamond Hook, Netherite Hook, Etched Cleaver, Radiant Cleaver,


</details>

Axes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Wooden Cleaver, Stone Cleaver, Iron Cleaver, Golden Cleaver, Diamond Cleaver, Netherite Cleaver, Clown's Scythe, Folly's Tree Branch, Dread Scythe, Spine Splitter, Gilded Hook, Elinator,


</details>

Trident:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Hell Fork, Spirit Fork, Elder Fork, Atlan, Pitchfork, Lime Fork, Gem Fork, Tuning Fork,


</details>


### One last thing
If you like my packs: please consider supporting and/or donating to me on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal), 
My Ko-Fi supporters also get a say in what packs I make next.
It helps so much, and means a lot.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
